name: Dance With Memes
short_description: Dance With Memes is very simple arcade game. Play with your favorite Twitch emotes using music/videos from internet or your hard drive. Test your skill and compare it with other players. The key is precision - smashing buttons will get you nowhere. Game supports Steam Leaderboards for Youtube videos.
detailed_description: Dance With Memes is very simple arcade game. Play with your favorite Twitch emotes using music/videos from internet or your hard drive. Test your skill and compare it with other players. The key is precision - smashing buttons will get you nowhere.  Game supports Steam Leaderboards (for Youtube videos only right now). Good luck and hope you will have fun!
